notes: Restricts closed incident reopen behavior to the dedicated Reopen action with a required reopen comment and blocks generic status or Kanban bypasses.
Locks problem RCA, known error, workaround, and permanent fix fields until the matching workflow stage is reached, while preserving the sequential action flow.
Adds a global CAB member configuration section under Admin and feeds the configured CAB members into change approval selection.
Improves action feedback on incident and problem workflow buttons so users see immediate in-progress state while server actions complete.
Adds regression tests for incident reopen enforcement, Kanban bypass prevention, problem field sequencing, and global CAB defaults.
